arts.ttl: Atalanta against Cagliari to reduce the gap
arts.sum: Cagliari have won just one of their last nine league away games (D3 L5), a 2-1 win over Monza on 5 January; they are also one of two teams, alongside with Como, who have never kept a clean sheet away from home in the current campaign. Cagliari have won four of their last six away games against Atalanta in Serie A (L2), after failing to win in their previous 14 (D4 L10).

arts.ttl: Serie A | Atalanta v Cagliari: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season heats up, Atalanta prepare to host Cagliari in a crucial match at the Gewiss Stadium on Saturday. This encounter comes at a pivotal moment for both teams, with Atalanta looking to solidify their position in the top four and Cagliari fighting to distance themselves from the relegation zone. The post Serie A | Atalanta v Cagliari: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
